name: your-skill-name
description: "Use when [specific repeated task]. Include common trigger phrases and keywords people will actually type."
---

# Skill Title

Use this skill when the task is specific, repeated, and benefits from a reusable workflow.

## Workflow

1. Gather the minimum required context.
2. Confirm the goal and success criteria.
3. Execute the workflow in a small number of clear steps.
4. Validate the result.
5. Summarize outcome and remaining risks.

## Guardrails

- State what this skill should not be used for.
- Prefer a narrow, repeatable scope.
- Include assets only when they materially improve consistency.

## Output

- Main result
- Validation performed
- Follow-up actions if any
